evals.prompt: 我想做一个给加拿大家庭用的 household finance app，先不要做全平台，帮我先切一个 MVP，然后分别给我中文设计概要和给 Codex 的英文 handoff。Repo 在 software-dev-squad/household-finance-app。
evals.expected_output: Should inspect the repo, cut scope to a smallest valuable finance loop, produce Chinese plan sections plus English canonical/Codex handoff, and explicitly separate scope from non-goals.

evals.prompt: Read my existing repo first and help me add a lightweight analyst board to the investment stack. I need a PM-style plan I can review in Chinese, then separate Codex and Antigravity handoffs in English. If the scope is too big, cut phase 1 aggressively.
evals.expected_output: Should read repo materials, identify current system shape, propose a phased analyst board MVP, and render both agent handoffs from one canonical context.

evals.prompt: I want a platform with chat, billing, analytics, AI copilots, and a mobile app. Turn this into something buildable, and give me OpenClaw work packets too.
evals.expected_output: Should challenge the oversized request, ask a highest-leverage clarifying question before pretending certainty if the ICP/core value is still missing, define a smallest valuable closed loop, preserve a clear non-goal list, and only create work packets if decomposition is actually justified.

evals.prompt: Please fix the login redirect bug in my repo and just patch the code. Don't give me a PM doc unless you really need one.
evals.expected_output: Should avoid over-activating full PM packaging; either decline to use the full skill or produce a minimal framing layer only if product/context ambiguity truly blocks implementation.
